sectionTitle: The World of Emotions | 感情世界

samples.sentence: 自我介紹一下，我叫李明。
samples.pinyin: zìwǒ jièshào yīxià, wǒ jiào lǐ míng.
samples.en: Let me introduce myself, my name is Li Ming.

samples.sentence: 小孩子應該學會自我保護。
samples.pinyin: xiǎo háizi yīnggāi xuéhuì zìwǒ bǎohù.
samples.en: Children should learn how to protect themselves.

items.en: to puff up; to swell; to expand

samples.pinyin: wùtǐ de péngzhàng lǜ hěn gāo.
samples.en: The expansion rate of the object is very high.

samples.sentence: 這材料的膨脹速度很快。
samples.pinyin: zhè cáiliào de péngzhàng sùdù hěn kuài.
samples.en: The material's expansion speed is very fast.

samples.pinyin: tāmen de miànmào hěn xiāngsì.
samples.en: Their appearances are very similar.

samples.pinyin: nàgè rén de miànmào hěn qīngxiù.
samples.en: That person has a delicate and refined appearance.

items.en: to come to one's senses; to realize

samples.meaning: come to realize the truth (one's error, etc.); wake up to reality
samples.pinyin: tā zhōngyú xǐngwù guòláile.
samples.en: He finally came to his senses.
samples.vi: Cuối cùng anh ấy đã tỉnh ngộ.

samples.meaning: come to realize the truth (one's error, etc.); wake up to reality
samples.pinyin: nǐ shénme shíhòu xǐngwù de?
samples.en: When did you realize it?
samples.vi: Khi nào bạn tỉnh ngộ vậy?

items.en: to know from experience; to realize

samples.sentence: 她的體會對我們很有幫助。
samples.pinyin: tā de tǐhuì duì wǒmen hěn yǒu bāngzhù.
samples.en: Her experience is very helpful to us.
samples.vi: Kinh nghiệm của cô ấy rất hữu ích cho chúng tôi.

samples.sentence: 這本書裡/裏有很多人生體會。
samples.pinyin: zhè běn shū lǐ yǒu hěnduō rénshēng tǐhuì.
samples.en: This book is full of life experiences.
samples.vi: Trong cuốn sách này có nhiều kinh nghiệm sống.

samples.meaning: bitter and astringent; harsh to the taste
samples.sentence: 這苦瓜的味道也太苦澀了吧。
samples.pinyin: zhè kǔguā de wèidào yě tài kǔsèle ba.
samples.en: The taste of this bitter melon is really too bitter, right?

samples.meaning: bitter and astringent; harsh to the taste
samples.sentence: 你們可以吃/喫味道苦澀的菜嗎？
samples.pinyin: nǐmen kěyǐ chī wèidào kǔsè de cài ma?
samples.en: Can you eat dishes with a bitter taste?

samples.pinyin: wǒ bùxiǎng hé qíngdí jiànmiàn.
samples.en: I don’t want to meet my romantic rival.
samples.vi: Tôi không muốn gặp mặt tình địch.

samples.pinyin: qíngdí zǒng shì rě wǒ shēngqì.
samples.en: My love rival always makes me angry.
samples.vi: Tình địch luôn làm tôi bực mình.

items.en: to do things one's own way

samples.meaning: persist in one's old ways (no matter what others say); do things one's own way; follow one's bigoted course; follow one's usual way of doing things no matter what others say; gang one's own gait; go one's own way; have (take) one's own way; stick to one's old way of doing things; take one's own course
samples.sentence: 儘管我們一再警告，他還是我行我素。
samples.pinyin: jǐnguǎn wǒmen yīzài jǐnggào, tā háishì wǒxíngwǒsù.
samples.en: In spite of our repeated warnings, he still went his own way.

samples.meaning: persist in one's own ways (no matter what others say); stick to one's old way; do whatever one wants to; disregard the advice of others
samples.pinyin: Tā zài gōngzuò shàng wǒ xíng wǒ sù.
samples.en: She does things her own way at work.

samples.pinyin: tā wèihūn, dàn yǒu nán péngyǒu.
samples.en: She is unmarried but has a boyfriend.

samples.pinyin: tā háishì wèihūn de qīngnián.
samples.en: He is still an unmarried young man.

items.en: to resolve to become; to set a goal

samples.meaning: to set one’s mind on; to be determined
samples.sentence: 我最近立誌要學好漢語呢！
samples.pinyin: wǒ zuìjìn lìzhì yào xuéhǎo hànyǔ ní!
samples.en: I’ve recently set my mind on mastering Chinese!
samples.vi: Tôi gần đây đã quyết tâm học tốt tiếng Hán.

samples.meaning: to set one’s mind on; to be determined
samples.sentence: 我一直都立誌要自己創業。
samples.pinyin: wǒ yīzhí dōu lìzhì yào zìjǐ chuàngyè.
samples.en: I’ve always been determined to start my own business.
samples.vi: Tôi luôn mong muốn tự mình khởi nghiệp.

samples.pinyin: wǒ de zhìxiàng shì bāngzhù biérén.
samples.en: My ambition is to help others.

samples.pinyin: wǒ de zhìxiàng shì dāng lǎoshī.
samples.en: My ambition is to be a teacher.

samples.sentence: 我正在嘗試減肥的方法。
samples.pinyin: wǒ zhèngzài chángshì jiǎnféi de fāngfǎ.
samples.en: I am trying methods of losing weight.

samples.sentence: 她試圖通過節食來減肥。
samples.pinyin: tā shìtú tōngguò jiéshí lái jiǎnféi.
samples.en: She's starving herself to try to lose weight.
samples.vi: Cô ấy cố gắng giảm cân bằng cách ăn kiêng.

items.en: to push yourself; to last; to hold out

samples.pinyin: liǎngshǒu chēngzhe xiàbā chénsī.

samples.vi: Hai tay chống cằm, trầm ngâm suy nghĩ.

samples.pinyin: tā yòng shǒu chēng zhù zhuōzi.
samples.en: He supported the table with his hands.

samples.pinyin: tā lái gōngsī kāihuì.

samples.pinyin: qǐng nǐ lái wǒ jiā wán.

samples.pinyin: tā jīnglìle cánkù de xùnliàn.
samples.en: He went through cruel training.
samples.vi: Anh ấy đã trải qua quá trình huấn luyện khắc nghiệt.

samples.pinyin: xiànshí yǒushí hěn cánkù.
samples.en: Reality is sometimes very harsh.

samples.pinyin: tā dāngxià juédìng líkāi.
samples.en: He decided to leave right now.

samples.pinyin: tā dāngxià jiù dāyìngle.

samples.meaning: to do sth all over again
samples.pinyin: wǒ děi chóng lái yībiàn.

samples.pinyin: tā juédìng chóng lái zhè xiàng rènwù.

samples.pinyin: dōngxi dōu fàng de luànqībāzāo.

samples.pinyin: tiānshàng nà shì shénme dōngxi?

samples.pinyin: zhège háizi zhǎng dé hǎo jùn ya!
samples.en: That child is so handsome!

samples.pinyin: zhè xiǎohuǒzi zhǎng de tǐng jùn de.

samples.pinyin: tāmen fūqī liǎ de rìzi tèbié huānxǐ.

samples.sentence: 他的到來令她異常歡喜。
samples.pinyin: tā de dàolái lìng tā yìcháng huānxǐ.

samples.pinyin: tā yīn líbié ér gǎndào bēishāng.

samples.pinyin: tā de yǎnzhōng liúlù chū bēishāng.

samples.vi: Trong mắt cô có chút bi thương.
